name: Pacific Sunset Salad
recipeInstructions:
Prepare the dressing by combining all ingredients. Refrigerate for at least one to two hours before serving.
Cut the pork into thin strips. In a bowl, mix soy sauce and garlic. Pour over the pork and coat evenly. Let it marinate at room temperature for 30 minutes.
Broil the pork strips until cooked through, about three minutes on each side. Remove and drain on paper towels. When cool, cut into bite-sized pieces. Refrigerate.
Wash the spinach thoroughly, remove stems and damaged leaves, and dry well. Place the leaves on chilled salad plates. Top with pineapple and papaya slices, followed by the pork pieces, and sprinkle with nuts. Just before serving, add the dressing.
